stories.title: A New Classroom
sentences: We have a new classroom.
It is very big and clean.
Look! This is my new desk.
Where is my schoolbag?
It is under the desk.
A picture is on the wall.
The window is near the computer.
Let's clean the classroom together.
I clean the blackboard.

questions.question: The new classroom is small and dirty.
questions.explanation: The story says the classroom is big and clean.

questions.question: Where is the schoolbag?
questions.explanation: The text states 'It is under the desk' referring to the schoolbag.

questions.question: What is on the wall?
questions.explanation: The story mentions 'A picture is on the wall.'

stories.title: Clean the Classroom
sentences: Today is Monday.
Zhang Peng and Mike clean the classroom.
Open the door, please.
Turn on the light.
The classroom is bright now.
Mike, please clean the windows.
Look at the kite on the wall.
It has a big face and a long tail.
We like our classroom very much.

questions.question: Mike and Zhang Peng clean the classroom on Monday.
questions.explanation: The story starts by saying it's Monday and they are cleaning.

questions.question: What does Zhang Peng want Mike to do?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Mike, please clean the windows.'

questions.question: What is on the wall?
questions.explanation: The story says 'Look at the kite on the wall.'

stories.title: Mike’s Heavy Schoolbag
sentences: Mike has a new blue schoolbag.
It is very heavy today.
What is in his schoolbag?
He has an English book and a maths book.
He has three storybooks and a candy.
Oh, look! There is a cute toy panda too.
Mike likes the panda very much.
The panda makes his bag heavy but fun.

questions.question: Mike has a new green schoolbag.
questions.explanation: The story says Mike has a new blue schoolbag, not green.

questions.question: How many books are in Mike's schoolbag in total?
questions.explanation: He has one English book, one maths book, and three storybooks (1+1+3=5).

questions.question: There is a cute _____ _____ in his bag.
questions.explanation: The text mentions there is a cute toy panda in the bag.

stories.title: A Surprise in the Bag
sentences: Chen Jie likes her big schoolbag.
She puts a Chinese book in it.
She has a white kite in the bag.
Wait! Something is moving in the bag.
It is her little cat, Mimi.
Mimi is thin and likes the bag.
Chen Jie takes Mimi out quickly.
The schoolbag is for books, not for cats!

questions.question: Chen Jie finds a cat in her schoolbag.
questions.explanation: The story says Mimi, her little cat, is in the bag.

questions.question: Which word in the story has the same 'i' sound as 'like' (long i)?
questions.explanation: 'Kite' and 'like' both have the long /aɪ/ sound, while the others have the short /ɪ/ sound.

questions.question: What kind of book does Chen Jie put in her bag?
questions.explanation: The second sentence says she puts a Chinese book in it.

stories.title: A New Friend
sentences: I have a new friend in my class.
He is tall and strong.
He has short hair and big eyes.
He has blue glasses on his nose.
Is he friendly? Yes, he is.
Who's he? He is my friend, Zhang Peng.
We like to play together after school.

questions.question: The new friend has long hair.
questions.explanation: The story says 'He has short hair'.

questions.question: What is on Zhang Peng's nose?
questions.explanation: The text states 'He has blue glasses on his nose.'

questions.question: Zhang Peng is ______ and strong.
questions.explanation: The story describes him as 'tall and strong'.

stories.title: My Quiet Friend
sentences: Look at this girl in the picture.
She is my good friend, Chen Jie.
She is thin and quiet.
She has long hair and a small nose.
She has a cute hat on her head.
She likes to write a note in her book.
I like my friend very much.

questions.question: What is Chen Jie like?
questions.explanation: The story says 'She is thin and quiet.'

questions.question: Chen Jie likes to write a note in her book.
questions.explanation: The text says 'She likes to write a note in her book.'

questions.question: Chen Jie has a ______ on her head.
questions.explanation: The text states 'She has a cute hat on her head.'

stories.title: Where is Mimi?
sentences: Zhang Peng has a new cat named Mimi.
Mimi is very cute.
But Mimi is missing now.
Is she in the living room?
No, she isn't.
Is she in the kitchen?
No, she isn't.
Look! The cat is in the bedroom.
Mimi is on the big bed.
She is sleeping now.

questions.question: Mimi is in the kitchen.
questions.explanation: The story says 'No, she isn't' when asking if she is in the kitchen. She is in the bedroom.

questions.question: Where is the cat at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Look! The cat is in the bedroom.'

questions.question: Mimi is on the big ____.
questions.explanation: The sentence in the story is 'Mimi is on the big bed.'

stories.title: A Cute Dog
sentences: Look at this room.
It is a study.
My dog is often here.
Can you use the computer?
The dog can use the computer too!
Is he under the desk?
No, he is on the chair.
I have a phone for him.
He is a cute dog.
I love my home and my dog.

questions.question: The dog is in the study.
questions.explanation: The story mentions the room is a study and the dog is often there.

questions.question: Which word in the story has the same 'u-e' sound as 'tube'?
questions.explanation: 'Use' and 'tube' both follow the u-e pattern and make the /juː/ sound.

questions.question: The dog is on the ____.
questions.explanation: The story says 'No, he is on the chair.'

stories.title: A Hungry Panda
sentences: It is 6 o'clock and the panda family is home.
Mom says, "Dinner's ready!"
The little panda asks, "What's for dinner?"
Mom has some beef, vegetables and delicious soup.
The little panda says, "I'd like some beef, please."
Dad says, "Help yourself. Pass me a bowl and chopsticks."
The little panda can use chopsticks well.
The family is very happy now.

questions.question: The panda family is having dinner at 6 o'clock.
questions.explanation: The story starts by saying it is 6 o'clock and the family is home for dinner.

questions.question: What would the little panda like for dinner?
questions.explanation: The little panda explicitly says, 'I'd like some beef, please.'

questions.question: Dad wants a _______ and chopsticks.
questions.explanation: The text says: 'Pass me a bowl and chopsticks.'

stories.title: Mike's School Lunch
sentences: Today is Monday and Mike is at school.
He is at the canteen for lunch.
Ms. White asks, "What would you like, Mike?"
He says, "I'd like some soup and vegetables."
Ms. White asks him, "Would you like a knife and fork?"
Mike says, "No, thank you. I can use chopsticks."
He is a good boy.
He eats all his vegetables.

questions.question: Mike uses a knife and fork to eat his lunch.
questions.explanation: Mike says 'No, thank you' to the knife and fork because he can use chopsticks.

questions.question: Where is Mike having his lunch?
questions.explanation: The story mentions Mike is at the canteen for lunch.

questions.question: Mike would like some soup and _______.
questions.explanation: Mike says, 'I'd like some soup and vegetables.'

stories.title: Mike's Big Family
sentences: Welcome to my home.
How many people are there in my family?
There are five people.
My parents are both teachers.
This is my uncle.
What's his job?
He is a tall driver.
I have no sister.
But I have a cute little puppy.

questions.question: There are six people in Mike's family.
questions.explanation: The story says there are five people in the family.

questions.question: What is Mike's uncle's job?
questions.explanation: The text states 'He is a tall driver.'

questions.question: Mike's father and mother are both ________.
questions.explanation: The story says 'My parents are both teachers.'

stories.title: The Happy Farm
sentences: Look! My aunt is on the farm.
She is a busy farmer.
My uncle is there too.
What's her job?
She is a helpful nurse.
No, she is not a nurse today.
She is helping my uncle.
My family is very happy on the farm.

questions.question: Where is the aunt?
questions.explanation: The first sentence says 'My aunt is on the farm.'

questions.question: The aunt is a farmer and she is busy.
questions.explanation: The story says 'She is a busy farmer.'

questions.question: The aunt's usual job is a ________.
questions.explanation: The story asks what her job is and says 'She is a helpful nurse.'
